payload.description: Q44 LTD will be replaced by Q44 SBS, operating at all times. SBS will follow same route as LTD from Merrick Blvd in Jamaica to the Bronx Zoo.
Q20A/B: Jamaica to College Point
Q44 LTD will be replaced by Q44 SBS. Q44: Jamaica to Bronx Zoo.

Q44 LTD will be replaced by Q44 SBS, operating at all times. SBS will follow same route as LTD from Merrick Blvd in Jamaica to the Bronx Zoo. Includes bus lanes, fare machines, curb regulation changes, and capital projects.

payload.description: Left turn restrictions at: SB Main St to Maple Av; NB Main St to Franklin Av; NB Main St to Booth Memorial Av; WB Booth Memorial to Main St; NB Main St to 59 Av; SB Main St to 60 Av. Left turn from SB Main to 56 Av is retained.

payload.description: Riders pay with MetroCard or coins before boarding. Take ticket from machine. Board bus through all three doors.
New curb regulations for bus lane hours and metered parking on Main St. Curbside bus lane blocks: 6 AM to 10 AM, 4 PM to 7 PM, Mon to Sat. Offset bus lane blocks: 7 AM to 7 PM, Mon-Sun.

tool_args.label: Q44 SBS stop removals in CB7

payload.claim_text: SBS will make fewer stops than Q44 LTD. 8 fewer stops in The Bronx. 4 stops removed in CB7: Whitestone Expy/Center Dr (currently SB only), Parsons Blvd/17 Av, Parsons Blvd/21 Av, Main St/Northern Blvd. All stops removed in CB7 will be served by Q20 (except Center Dr SB).
